title: Digital Gold
author: Nathaniel Popper
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A GIANT hollow Bitcoin B (with two vertical strokes through it). It's drawn as a wireframe, not filled. Beneath it, a single red coin / circle. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1400)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- The B (uppercase) at 1100px, hollow -->
    <g font-size="1400" font-weight="300" letter-spacing="-0.05em">
      <text x="0" y="380" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6" stroke-linejoin="miter">B</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Two vertical strokes through the B (the Bitcoin mark) -->
    <line x1="-220" y1="-220" x2="-220" y2="380" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6"/>
    <line x1="220" y1="-220" x2="220" y2="380" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6"/>
    <!-- A single small RED coin at the bottom-center, like a peer node -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="500" r="20" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A whisper label: 'GOLD' below -->
    <text x="0" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">SATOSHI · 2009</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 1400px hollow Bitcoin B with the two vertical strokes, the only chromatic element being a small red dot beneath labeled 'SATOSHI · 2009' — the origin. 320px weight-500 title at the top.
